name: Night Market Triptych
shortDescription: A three-panel giclée in lacquer red and jade, inspired by lantern-lit market stalls.
description: Night Market Triptych is a three-panel giclée print built from an original gouache painting. Deep lacquer red and jade green play against warm ivory, printed on 100% cotton rag with archival pigment ink. Each panel ships ready to frame, with a fourth blank border for a floating-mount look.
shippingInfo: Ships rolled in a rigid tube within 3–5 business days.

name: Gold Leaf Magnolia
shortDescription: A single magnolia bloom in warm gold and plum, hand-finished with metallic ink.
description: Gold Leaf Magnolia takes a single studio painting and reproduces its metallic highlights with a spot-gold ink pass, so the petals genuinely catch the light. Printed on heavyweight matte stock and signed on the back by hand.
shippingInfo: Ships flat in a protective mailer within 3–5 business days.

name: Deep Navy Tideline
shortDescription: An abstract coastline in ink navy and warm white, quiet and weighted.
description: Deep Navy Tideline began as a set of ink studies of the Gulf coastline. This print keeps the horizon low and the palette restrained — ink navy fading to warm white, with a single hairline of gold at the waterline.
shippingInfo: Ships flat in a protective mailer within 3–5 business days.

name: Coral Reef Study No. 3
shortDescription: Bright coral and turquoise in a loose, gestural reef study.
description: Part of an ongoing series of reef studies, No. 3 leans into saturated coral and turquoise with loose, confident brushwork. A playful, high-energy piece for a room that wants a little more color.
shippingInfo: Ships flat in a protective mailer within 3–5 business days.

name: Amber Thread Mahjong Mat
shortDescription: Hand-stitched neoprene mat in gold and ink, sized for a standard 144-tile set.
description: Amber Thread pairs a soundproof 3mm neoprene core with a stitched ivory-and-gold border, hand-finished at the studio. Sized for a standard 144-tile set with room for racks and a discard zone. Machine-washable, rolls flat for storage.
shippingInfo: Ships rolled in a branded box within 5–7 business days.

name: Jade Court Mahjong Mat
shortDescription: Deep jade mat with a hand-painted tile motif border, table-corner friendly.
description: Jade Court takes its palette straight from the studio's painting practice — deep jade fading to ivory, framed with a hand-painted border of tile silhouettes. The rounded-corner cut is designed to sit flush on most square and round tables.
shippingInfo: Ships rolled in a branded box within 5–7 business days.

name: Lacquer Red Travel Mat
shortDescription: A folding travel-size mat in lacquer red, for games on the road.
description: Lacquer Red Travel Mat folds into thirds and closes with a magnetic snap, built for weekend trips and family games away from home. Same soundproof core as the full-size mats, scaled down to fit a carry-on.

name: Custom Mahjong Mat
shortDescription: Your palette, your border motif — built to order, one at a time.
description: The Custom Mahjong Mat starts as a conversation. Pick a base palette, a border motif, and (optionally) monogram initials at one corner; the studio hand-finishes each order individually. Allow an extra week of production ahead of the shipping window below.
dimensions: 31 x 31 in (custom sizing available on request)
shippingInfo: Ships rolled in a branded box within 10–14 business days.

name: Lavender Hour
shortDescription: A dusk-toned interior scene in lavender and warm white.
description: Lavender Hour captures a studio interior at dusk — soft lavender light against warm white walls, painted directly from life over three evenings in February. A quieter piece for a bedroom or reading nook.
shippingInfo: Ships flat in a protective mailer within 3–5 business days.

name: Mustard Field
shortDescription: A wide mustard-and-navy field study, loose and sunlit.
description: Mustard Field is a wide-format landscape study in mustard yellow and ink navy, painted on location over a single afternoon. Works well as a horizontal anchor above a sofa or console.
shippingInfo: Ships flat in a protective mailer within 3–5 business days.
